calendar.matters:
Petition To Recover Trust Assets; And For Order Directing Transfer Of Trust Assets To The Trust And Award Of Damages, Fees, And Costs
Off Calendar Feb-19-2019 Off Calendar

Petition To Recover Trust Assets; And For Order Directing Transfer Of Trust Assets To The Trust And Award Of Damages, Fees, And Costs
Off Calendar Nov-20-2018 Continued To Feb-19-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Maria Lawless for Stephanie Sakai (Respondent).
Kathy Fisher and Jessica Kaplan for Linda Cheng and Edward Cheng (Trustees).

Ms. Lawless stated that she had been reluctant to do mediation, that it is her understanding that the trust is worth $500,000.00 and that $200,000.00 has gone out to the Attorney's, that Myia has retained her own Counsel now and has made other requests, and these are assets that relate to whether the marital agreement is being performed or not. Ms. Fisher stated that she agrees to mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than February 6, 2019. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by February 13, 2019. The Petition to Recover Trust Assets, etc. is continued to and the Parties are to return on February 19, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Santiago. Not reported.
